ham.subject: This Week’s Highlights – Boost Your Sales with Our New Features
ham.body:
Hello Team,

We’re excited to share the latest updates that are designed to help you close more deals and increase revenue.

• New Mobile Dashboard – Access real‑time metrics on the go.
• Enhanced Lead Scoring – Prioritize prospects with AI‑driven insights.
• Email Templates – 10 ready‑to‑send templates for different buyer stages.

Take advantage of these tools by visiting <URL> and exploring the new features.

Let’s make this quarter our best yet!

Best regards,
Marketing Team
